title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google quantization technique that reduces VRAM requirements and improves efficiency by applying vector quantization to KV caches in large language models. The method uses codebook-based compression with mean squared error optimization to minimize information loss during quantization.
